title: Whitefurze - Basic Gardening Pot Saucer - Terracotta Indoor Plant Pot Saucers - Plant Tray For Pots - Polypropylene Plant Saucer for Indoor & Outdoor Use, 25cm Diameter Plant Drip Tray
features: OPTIMISED PLANT CARE - The plant pot saucers catch excess water and prevent overwatering, ideal environment for healthy root growth. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor plants, these plant trays protect your floors, shelves, and surfaces from water damage

DURABLE & RELIABLE - These terracotta saucers withstand daily use and harsh weather conditions. The plant drip trays’ sturdy design ensures they won't crack or warp, offering long-lasting support and promoting efficient drainage

EASY TO USE & MAINTAIN - Lightweight and simple to handle, these plant plates make gardening effortless for beginners and experts alike. Place the plant pot tray under your pots to catch runoff and keep your space tidy while maintaining plant hydration

MULTIPLE SIZE OPTIONS - Available in various sizes (10-20cm and 25-38cm), these plant dishes fit plant pots ranging from 7.5-38cm, ensuring optimal drainage for small, medium, and large plants while preventing water buildup

TIMELESS TERRACOTTA DESIGN - Featuring a neutral, terracotta-inspired finish, these saucers for plant pots blend effortlessly with any décor—modern interiors or rustic outdoor spaces—keeping the focus on your plants
